primitive.$description: Derived primitives — real brand colors, names derived from their oklch coordinates, descriptions generated from computed contrast under normal + deuteranopia/protanopia/tritanopia vision. The only color tier for now (semantic + recipe tiers removed). No old names anywhere: the name IS the color. The doc cannot drift from the value because it is computed from it.

oklch-41_69-0_0817-166_22-1.$description: A dark green. As text on light backgrounds it reaches 6.8 to 1 — past the 4.5:1 minimum for readable text — and still holds 6.4 to 1 for color-blind readers. So it stays legible for everyone, including the three common kinds of color-blindness.
